text.title: Cognitive Inclusion Design Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-flows
step.action: List every flow with >3 steps, deadlines, or sustained-attention demands.

step.name: apply-patterns
step.action: Apply chunking + predictability + escape-hatch patterns to each flow.

step.name: expose-settings
step.action: Add focus_mode + dyslexia_font + reduced_motion + extended_time + plain_language toggles.

step.name: map-wcag
step.action: Tag each with the WCAG SC it satisfies.

step.name: validate-completion
step.action: Run cognitive-inclusion validator; resolve all violations.
step.decision-gate: If validator reports missing settings, complete before publish.
